profile.bio: Shishir | SWE @RoxNor | 4x IEEE Publication | PSTU CSE (Rank 12/85). I am a Software Engineer who thrives at the intersection of academic rigor and massive-scale engineering. From ranking 12th out of 85 in my CSE cohort to publishing 4 IEEE papers, my foundation is built on deep research and technical precision. Currently, at RoxNor, I architect ultra-scalable systems designed to serve millions. I believe that the fusion of rapid learning and personal accountability is more than a professional trait - it is the engine for national progress and the key to inventing a future that empowers us all
